# Feature: Fast dev start (autoOpen + hard reload cache bypass)

<!-- auto-generated by /implement on 2026-07-10 -->

## Intent
Visual inspector must be ready immediately on every app restart (user always inspects visually). Host apps like Scriptony should not need workarounds. Hard Reload must bypass WebView cache so frontend changes are visible without full shell restart, while preserving the Rust hub session (selections marked stale).

## Preconditions
- Plugin registered with `visual-inspector` feature
- `plugins.visualEditor.enabled: true`, `allow: true`
- Dev build or `allowInProduction: true`
- Host capability includes `visual-editor:all`

## Happy Path
- [ ] `autoOpen: true` (default): overlay/toolbar visible after first host webview ready without manual `open()`
- [ ] `autoOpen: false`: no overlay on start; `open()` shows overlay
- [ ] Hard Reload clears WebView cache by default (`clearCache: true`) then reloads target webview
- [ ] After hard reload (embedded mode): toolbar reappears when overlay was open; picker re-activates when enabled
- [ ] Hub session (issue text, selections) survives hard reload; selections marked stale
- [ ] Hard Reload works while picker is active (toolbar buttons not blocked — regression)

## Edge Cases
- [ ] `hard_reload({ clearCache: false })` skips cache clear (soft reload)
- [ ] Unknown webview id returns clear error
- [ ] Security gates block before any overlay open

## Regression
- [ ] `npm run checks` passes
- [ ] `open` / `close` / `toggle` still control overlay
- [ ] `enable` / `disable` picker unchanged
- [ ] Window overlay mode (`overlayMode: "window"`) still auto-opens when `autoOpen: true`

## Assumptions
- `clear_all_browsing_data` also clears host `localStorage` — documented as trade-off; `clearCache: false` to opt out
- Default `overlayMode` stays `embedded` for zero host UI code

## Implementation Notes
- Files touched: `crates/plugin/src/config.rs`, `lib.rs`, `webview.rs`, `reload.rs`, `commands.rs`, `models.rs`, `security.rs`, `docs/integration-guide.md`, `docs/plugin-api.md`, `packages/inspector-app/src/api.ts`, `packages/sdk/src/overlay/client.ts`
- `autoOpen` default `true`; `maybe_auto_open_overlay` replaces unconditional `ensure_*` on startup
- `hard_reload` clears browsing data by default, restores embedded toolbar/picker after reload
- Unit tests: `config::tests::auto_open_defaults_true`, `auto_open_can_be_disabled`
- Limitation: `clear_all_browsing_data` wipes host `localStorage`; use `clearCache: false` to opt out
